_comment: WO-105 ship spec: no part in this system realizes geometry yet (turned/bored liner + drilled injector ops are outside the v1 realizable feature set), so the applicable families are the identity BOM (mass cells honestly empty pending geometry) and the contract graph sheet. three_d/drawings-mech/boards/firmware are named-absent by construction. WO-105 ship fix: rows without realized geometry ride the augment-only bom.lines identity rows -- the mech step-export family requires RealizedGeometry per assembly row.
